title: Final Nights: Freedom
description: A modpack focusing on Vampirism and Tinker's Construct and their popular addons including Werewolves and Construct Armory.
body:
The Overworld has become more dangerous. Vampires and werewolves claim the night as their own, 
while vicious beasts have emerged from the wilderness. However, it is not hopeless.

New materials and smithing techniques have allowed more powerful arms and armour to be made,
and an order of hunters has been established to protect the humans and villagers threatened
by these creatures.

It is up to you to join these hunters, or realise the power of the night and take these lands as their
rightful ruler.

----

A modpack focusing on Vampirism and Tinker's Construct and their popular addons including Werewolves and Construct Armory. Also includes immersive and QoL mods such as Ambient Sounds, JEI, inventory sorting, mouse tweaks, etc.
<details>
    <summary>FAQ</summary>

- Why "Freedom"?
 > Originally I was going to make this modpack on Curseforge, but after being annoyed at it, I decided to start a "Freedom" version on Modrinth (named after it's open-source philosophy) to see how well it would turn out. I don't know if I'll finish the Curseforge version, but in case I do, it'll have a different subtitle.

- How do I get started with X mod?/I'm stuck and can't progress in X mod!
 > Vampirism and Tinker's have books that are very helpful, your answer is probably in there! If not, look for the mod here on Modrinth and check their wiki. Or you could type @<mod> in JEI and see if you can find the station that starts that mod.

- I can't feed as a vampire!
 > Middle-mouse button is now feed. If that's a problem, it can be rebound in your controls.

- How do I use the gender mod?
 > The G key.

</details>

***Anything not listed is a dependency or missed accidentally because I'm a dummy.***

## License
Do anything you want with this modpack, except for putting it behind a paywall or building on it without crediting me somewhere. This doesn't override the licenses of the individual mods in this pack.
